expectations.text: Response contains required substrings (set_group_by_shank, SortGroup.SortGroupElectrode, SpikeSortingRecording).
Response does not contain forbidden substring `set_group_by_electrode_group is fine`.
Identifies set_group_by_electrode_group as the wrong grouper for clusterless pipelines
expectations.evidence: 'The older v0 pipeline ... did expose a set_group_by_electrode_group helper that grouped a whole electrode_group_name together. There's no v1 equivalent — and even on v0 it would have produced this same multi-shank-group footgun on a polymer probe. Don't try to port it over.'

expectations.text: Recommends set_group_by_shank with the exact method name
expectations.evidence: `SortGroup().set_group_by_shank(nwb_file_name=nwb_file_name)` shown as the supported v1 helper.

expectations.text: Shows SortGroup.SortGroupElectrode inspection to verify one-shank-per-group
expectations.evidence: Verify section uses `(SortGroup.SortGroupElectrode & key).fetch(format='frame')` and `groupby('sort_group_id')['probe_shank'].nunique()` to confirm 1 shank per group.

expectations.text: Does not frame this as a SpikeInterface bug
expectations.evidence: Opening: 'this is not a SpikeInterface bug and the grouper isn't broken'.
